text: What amounts to a valid offer and acceptance under Indian contract law, and how are offers through email or WhatsApp treated?
When can a penalty or liquidated damages clause be reduced by courts under Section 74 of the Indian Contract Act?
Explain frustration under Section 56 and when a contract becomes void due to impossibility.
What is the difference between liquidated damages and penalty in Indian law, and which Supreme Court cases define the standard?
Are e-contracts and clickwrap agreements enforceable in India? Point to the statutory basis and key cases.
What are the usual termination for convenience and force majeure clauses in Government EPC/GCC templates, and how are notice and cure periods framed?
Under Sections 73–75, how is compensation for breach assessed and what is the role of mitigation?
How is an arbitration clause communicated via electronic correspondence treated at the prima facie stage under Section 7 of the Arbitration and Conciliation Act?
What are standard security/performance guarantee requirements in model concession agreements or EPC contracts issued by Indian ministries?
What limitations exist on specific performance compared to damages, and what do Law Commission reports say about reforms to Specific Relief?
